identity.name: MC Server Scout
identity.mode_strategy: Dark Mode Only (with optional toggle, but prioritized for Dark)

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-black font-bold hover:bg-primary/90 hover:shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(0,255,163,0.4)] transition-all duration-300 rounded-none clip-path-polygon
buttons.secondary: border border-border bg-transparent hover:bg-secondary/10 hover:border-secondary text-primary transition-all duration-300 rounded-none

cards.base: bg-black/40 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/10 rounded-xl overflow-hidden shadow-2xl hover:border-primary/50 transition-colors duration-300
cards.neon_border: relative p-[1px] bg-gradient-to-r from-primary via-secondary to-primary rounded-xl

inputs.search: bg-black/50 border-2 border-white/20 focus:border-primary text-xl p-6 w-full rounded-lg placeholder:text-white/20 transition-all font-mono
inputs.standard: bg-secondary/20 border border-white/10 focus:border-primary rounded-md px-4 py-2

status_indicators.pulse: relative flex h-3 w-3 items-center justify-center rounded-full

animations.glitch: keyframe animation for text distortion on hover/error

icons.custom: Use SVG for Minecraft specific icons (sword, pickaxe) if needed

api_integration.handling: Use React Query or SWR for caching. Handle loading, error, and offline states explicitly.

parsing.motd: Create a utility function to parse Minecraft color codes (§a, §b...) into HTML spans with corresponding colors defined in colors.minecraft_codes.
parsing.images: Server icons usually come as Base64. If not, use placeholder.

layout_structure.header: Fixed, glassmorphism, contains Logo and 'History' trigger.
layout_structure.hero: Centered Search Bar with 'Scan' button. Background should have the abstract tech image with heavy overlay.
layout_structure.results: Animate in when data is fetched. Use Bento Grid layout.

universal_guidelines: Do not get biased or lean towards generic AI designs.
Fusion over Imitation: Mix 3+ design references into something unique.
Emotion First: Every design decision maps to a feeling, not a trend.
Content is king: Tell a story. Every page must feel emotionally directed.
Zoom in: Use close-ups and bold focus on essential details.
Negative Space: Value the empty areas; they give breathing room.
Contrast: Use light vs. dark, rough vs. smooth contrasts.
Avoid the Center-Everything Disease: Asymmetry creates tension.
Avoid Gradient Overload: More than 20% gradient feels like decoration.
All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attribute.
